notes: Ethiopia Master Facility Registry (MFR v2) has no public machine-readable spec. The et-mfr adaptor is a thin HTTP wrapper (get/post/request). Endpoints (/Location/Regions, /Facility, /Facility/All, /Facility/GetFacilities, /Facility/ExportCSV) were taken from the adaptor JSDoc examples; request/response schemas (Region, Facility, paging, CSV export) are best-effort approximations. Server base URL approximated from the MFR portal host and should be verified.
